steps: Add 20 g/100 mL TAPS in an acid-washed bottle
Add 10 g/100 mL KNO 3 in an acid-washed bottle Potassium nitrate Contributed by users
Add 16 g/100 mL Ca(NO 3 ) 2 *4H 2 O calcium nitrate Contributed by users
Add 4 g/100 mL MgSO 4 *7H 2 O Magnesium sulfate heptahydrate Contributed by users
Add 5 g/100 mL Na 2 *beta-glycerophospahte
Add 1 L Milli-Q H 2 O to an acid-washed bottle
Add 1 g Na 2 EDTA EDTA Disodium Salt Contributed by users Catalog #PubChem CID:8759
Add 194 mg FeCl 3 Iron(III) chloride hexahydrate Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #44944
Add 36 mg MnCl 2 *4H 2 O Manganese chloride Fisher Scientific Catalog #7773-01-5
Add 10.44 mg ZnCl 2 Zinc dichloride Contributed by users
Add 12.62 mg Na 2 MoO 4 *2H 2 O Sodium molybdate dihydrate Contributed by users
Add 4.04 mg CoCl 2 *6H 2 O Cobalt (II) chloride hexahydrate Fisher Scientific Catalog #7791-13-1
Add 1 L Milli-Q H 2 O to an acid-washed bottle
Add 10 mg Thiamine HCl (Vitamin B1) Thiamine HCl P212121
Add 0.1 mg Biotin (Vitamin H) Biotin P212121
Add 0.1 mg Cyanocobalamin (Vitamin B12) Vitamin B12 Fisher Scientific Catalog #68-19-9
Filter sterilize. Aliquot into 1.5 mL microcentrifuge tubes and store and -20ºC.
Filter sterilize. It may be helpful to dispense into 50 mL Falcon tubes. Store at 4ºC.
Add 990 mL Milli-Q H 2 O to an acid-washed bottle
Add 2 mL TAPS stock solution
Add 1 mL KNO 3 stock solution
Add 1 mL Ca(NO 3 ) 2 *4H 2 O stock solution
Add 1 mL MgSO 4 *7H 2 O stock solution
Add 1 mL N 2 *beta-glycerophosphate stock solution
Add 3 mL trace metal stock solution
Adjust pH to ~8.2
Autoclave at 121ºC for 20 min
Add 1 mL vitamin stock solution after media cools
creator: Steven W Wilhelm
